title: grewia palawanensis
intro: Grewia palawanensis, also known as Palawan hawthorn or Palawan grewia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Grewia palawanensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat various gastrointestinal problems. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and its leaves and roots can also be used to make herbal preparations such as tinctures and infusions, which are used to treat various health conditions.
